reviews_data.review_text: The bowls are delicious. My new favorite spot!
Muy bien
I love ordering from here! The employees are very nice and helpful and the food is always delicious and prompt. Definitely one of my favorite places to go for a healthy meal nearby!!
This was our first time here. Super cute decor, yummy açaí bowl. My 12 year old and I shared a Sunset bowl in the “regular” size and couldn’t even finish it.
Great space to study! Great service and really good Açai.
This is a great place to hang with your daughter who loves the menu and always there.
Amazing place with friendly workers !!!! Delicious açaí bowls !!!!

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text: They are very good and great service!

I decided to do this review after my third visit here… all 3 times a different associate, all 3 times no greeting, all 3 times no “ thank you “ or “have a nice day “. The bowls and beverages are great. I stop in when I’m in the area getting groceries from food lion next door. Just unfortunate my experience has been disappointing.
Always a great atmosphere. Loved the way she answered questions we had about featured bowls and it was quickly fixed.
My 2nd time & rapidly becoming my favorite
Great selection of acai bowls & smoothies!

My new favorite go-to spot just unlocked!! By far, this is my favorite Palm Berries location; employees even have my order memorized! Great customer service and they’re very quick and fast. I usually order and have my order the next minute. I highly recommend. These açaí bowls are to die for (warning: very addicting). Try the pure base!!! 🤤
The Food,service and atmosphere is amazing.The bowls are always delicious and they always give me extra nutella. The current employees are amazing !! Love this place!!

It is beautiful and gives a very calm relaxing feeling. The bowls are always very full with the freshest fruit. My favorite is the pineapple smoothie and both employees who made it made it perfect. They are always very kind and helpful with suggestions. 10 out of 10

reviews_data.owner_answer:
We are so sorry for this regretful experience. Please let me make up for it and show you what Palm Berries Concord aims to be! 

Text me @ 980-866-2421 or email me at adil@palmberriesnc.com please so we can make rectify this experience of yours!
reviews_data.review_text: Had gone to a grande opening of another location and didn't have the best experience, tried this location because it's closer to home hoping for better & absolutely not. Found two hairs in my bowl before taking a fullbite, the girl at the counter rolled her eyes when I handed it back to her & just said "sorry". Second bowl served was liquidy, not nearly as many toppings. The tables floors and seats were absolutely disgusting and didn't look as nice as the other store i had been to. Giving up on Palm Berries in general due to a second terrible experience even at another location
The bowls are always plentiful and delicious

We’re always up for an açaí bowl and happened upon Palm Berries in Concord.  This place definitely gets a lot of traffic but things move pretty quickly so there was not much waiting.  They have a different twist on some of the açaí bases where they incorporate other items into them such as bananas, spinach and protein.  Not saying this was good or bad but different; it does dilute the açaí though.  I enjoyed a medium Protein Bowl and it was good.  They have two other sizes; a snack size and then Jumbo.  A medium was ample for someone with an average appetite.  The staff provided great service.  I did think the prices were a little high.  Overall though, a good experience and we will visit again.
Suad is a great worker who really brightened my day with her kindness!
the bowls are amazing!!! the employees were also super nice!! wonderful place

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Holly, 

We are so sorry for this unacceptable experience. We would love for an opportunity to show you how much we appreciate not only your feedback, but you as a customer as well.

Please reach out to us at 980-866-2421 or adil@palmberriesnc.com and let us make it right
reviews_data.review_text: There was not a lot of Açai base in my bowl. There was, however, a lot of hair in it.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hello Brandy, 

Thank you so much for your feedback. We would love for an opportunity to show you how much we appreciate not only your feedback, but you as a customer as well.

Please reach out to us at 980-866-2421 or adil@palmberriesnc.com and let us make it right
reviews_data.review_text: A lot of the times it’s great. But today, the girl who fixed my order act like she was irritated because they messed up my orders that I paid extra for it to make it a certain way, so most of the time it’s great but today the vibes were definitely off! Posted
Live everything about Palm Berries!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Been a fan of Palm Berries for several years since the food truck days! Consistent, delicious and something I always look forward to! Thanks!!
Loved loved loved. Place had great vibes and energy. Very cute and chilled. Loved how fast services was would for SURE !!!!! Hands down Will return.

Oh my stars! The Dubai Chocolate Açaí Bowl was absolutely heavenly. Hands down the best açaí bowl I have ever had! Not only was the flavor combination amazing, the amount of toppings they put on are the perfect amount to go with every single bite. Sometimes açai bowls run out of the toppings before you’re done with the entire bowl, but not this one. The ambience here is also so cute. Another thing I run into with açai bowls is they take a while to be made; this place made the bowl so quickly.

Great customer service and presentations from June and Betsy
We will be coming back for their fruits bowls!
Delicious Acai bowls! Definitely recommend!

bro their açaí bowls are fire, literally everything is so clean, they’re so respectful and they take good care of their customers which means alottt!  shout out to the hijabi queens that are so respectful and caring, can’t remember their names but they’re so sweet!

reviews_data.review_text: Very cozy.  The staff is so sweet and will answer any questions.

reviews_data.review_text: It was great!
This experience was amazing, Lucero was excellent she was so nice, I will definitely come back.
They have great acai bowls here. Friendly staff things have been looking up LOL

reviews_data.review_text: This is such a good food to eat when you need a snack or you can take it to go but this food is amazing.
The Best Bowl Place in Concord without Question. Highly recommend from QtheBoxer
Don’t go bad place go to the other and you will see the different
Great service! Great food 100% recommend

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Dragon Bowl, Horizon, Sami Protein and Queen, Shaved Ice, Shopska Salad, Superhuman Base, Pink Base, Queen City Bowl, Gainz, Very Berry Base

reviews_data.review_text: The cutest place ever with the best staff! I have had the best experiences here they are so nice and make your bowl/blend in a timely manner! The smoothies and bowls are the best I’ve ever had!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Nader,
We take reviews seriously, but your comments are completely misleading and omit critical context.
On multiple occasions, your behavior in our establishment was unacceptable. You directed aggressive and inappropriate conduct toward our staff, including 16-year-old employees, which we will not tolerate under any circumstances. There was also an incident where you caused a disturbance—dropping items and yelling—creating an uncomfortable and hostile environment for both our team and other customers.
Despite this, we made repeated efforts to accommodate you and resolve your concerns each time you visited. Unfortunately, every interaction—whether with you or your wife—resulted in issues. After a clear pattern of disruptive behavior, we made the necessary decision to refuse service in order to protect our employees and maintain a respectful environment.
Your decision to now post false claims because you are no longer welcome is disappointing, but it does not change the facts of what occurred.
reviews_data.review_text:
2 time I purchase from them and the two time it was hair in my bowl is really nasty place when I went back I told them and show to them they act like they don’t care bad place to go to
Go to the one it’s 20 minute away way more clean and way better people working there
You can see a smile when you open the door at the other place
Amazing!!
Palm Berries never disappoints! Our favorite smoothie place!
We love going to Palm Berries! The bowls are always delicious and the staff is very friendly!
Every worker was friendly and I was greeted right away as I walked in. Great relaxing atmosphere. Smoothie was very delicious and worth the price. I highly recommend this place to others.

Go to the other location you will receive some respect no manger employees they do what ever they want my bowl was dirty açaí was all over from outside I went back and talk to the little girl there she was really rude not want to help
She said that’s how it come
Worst place dirty
Lucero was super sweet and accommodating I will def be back!

Every time I go it’s always clean it smells good and I always get the best service I went the other day and I was able to get my bowl put into a drink thanks to Betsy and the cashier was so sweet I can’t pronounce her name but it starts with an L!
These girls are wicked fast, foods always top quality
I love love love this place. The bowls are always hitting, the staff is so friendly and the environment is very calming. Music is a nice touch too 💯💯💞

Worst employee’s and management
Ever
Ryah was so amazing so kind, thoughtful, and really helped me through the process of ordering and she’s beautiful!!
Great place the blend (smoothie) I got was fantastic tasted really fresh and fruity 10/10👍🏼
Love this place!
I ordered the Palm bowl and it’s delicious. The service at this location is also great.
Love it.  So tasty
Vibes were berry good 😋
Palm Berries Is the most consistent with their “ açaí bowls “, I am so impressed by the quality and price point. I’ve ordered via DoorDash on multiple occasions.
Love Palm Berries! Their acai bowls are excellent and they have so many options.

My husband has been going here all the time and I was finally able to to join him. Wow. Was really missing out! Being to Hawaii several times we have become acai bowl snobs, by this place is the closest we’ve been! The fruit is really fresh and the acai amazing! Takes us right back to the beaches of Honolulu. Do your self a favor and check this place out! You won’t be disappointed. 😋
Great customer service and quality! The employees were very nice and helpful and the açaí bowls were very good!
So good! The açaí was delicious and it’s decorated so cute!
Great customer service, great food, love the ambiance and the aesthetics of the store front.
Not only were the bowls amazing but what really had me sold was the atmosphere. Nobody does it like they do, 100% the best açaí!!!
Whole staff is A1
Quiet. Peaceful. Great service. Good at explaining process and ingredients. Yummy.
My favorite spot for Açaí bowls & smoothies!!
Hands down the best Açai in Concord. Spotless hygiene, incredible taste everything here is top notch.  Dubai chocolate bowl is an absolute must try. 🍓

We ordered our bowls online to go and they were perfect - full to the brim and delicious. The person working also knows us and immediately pulls our order out of the fridge when we get there so there’s no waiting. Great service!

I love this place , I frequent this location and the one in Mooresville! I’m trying to be a little more health conscious and was craving a Dubai chocolate treat and this place has a bowl but I wanted to see if I can get it in smoothie form. The young lady was stoked to experiment and make it for me and it is freaking delicious!

I love Palm Berries Concord! I can’t quit the Dubai bowls to even try anything else! The staff is usually very kind and one sweet girl even knows when she sees me that I’m getting the Dubai bowl! Super fan!

My husband and I never realized the workers don’t wear hair nets preparing the food until I found a curly black piece of hair in mine tonight. I’ll be more weary of this place moving forward now that I’ve noticed this.

The food is usually good, but consistently gets orders wrong even when they were placed online with specific toppings listed on the ticket. Not to mention they charge extra for each topping. They forgot the granola on both bowls the last time I came, and the nutella/peanut butter has not been the best lately
Great service

The floor is decorated in a special paint. The AC is always right. The smell of fruits, ice cream, berries, and cozy atmosphere is welcoming. Can't sit more then 20 people. Music is welcoming and entertaining.
This is my 10 or 11 Dubai bowl I  have ordered. The  thing is sooo gooood.  From start to end.
I just can't find my points that I have accumulated. But one day it will show up.
Everything is so natural  and fulfilling.
Great environment
Really excited to try
I love your guys a aj
Absolutely amazing! Fresh ingredients. Nice atmosphere.

Palm Berries in Concord is my favorite spots for acai bowls! Their bowls are always fresh and delicious, and i love that they offer a “create your bowl” option so i can customize exactly what I’m craving.

My açaí order is pretty basic but i love it…
Base: Classic
Fruit: Strawberries & bananas
Dry toppings: chocolate chips
Drizzle: Peanut butter
All bowls come with granola unless otherwise specified.

the portions are generous, the ingredients taste super fresh, and everything is beautifully put together. on top of that, the staff is always so friendly and welcoming, which makes the experience even better. highly recommend if you’re looking for a healthy, refreshing treat!
I loooove this spot! Fruit is always fresh, order is always right, delicious!! A must try.
Best acai ever 🤑 they load it up too😌
Palm Berries is amazing Fresh and tasty food, delicious drinks and ice creams, friendly service, and a clean relaxing atmosphere. Highly recommend

I’ve been to palm berries twice now and both times it was amazing. I’ve tried a lot of acai  bowls at different places, but this is by far the best! It’s super fresh and beautifully made. The shop was aesthetically pleasing and has clean vibe to it. Most importantly everything tastes as good as it looks. This is a 10/10 must try!
Absolutely loved everything, service was top-notch.  Highly recommend!

Palm Berries in Charlotte is a fantastic spot! Their creations are incredibly fresh and delicious, and they have a great variety of options. It's the perfect healthy treat, and the staff is always so friendly. Highly recommend it!
Really loved the atmosphere

review_questions.Vegetarian offerings: Menu is all vegetarian, Large vegetarian selection, Vegetarian menu or section, Clearly labeled vegetarian dishes

reviews_data.review_text: Great food.  Best prices. Excellent service. Amazing vibe. 100% recommended. Must try.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you for your feedback, Veronica. We’re so sorry that you’ve felt our customer service has not been up-to-par the last week. We want to make it right with you and hope you’ll give us the chance! Please email or text us at your earliest convenience @

Adil@palmberriesnc.com
or
980-866-2421

Thank you and we look forward to hearing from you!
reviews_data.review_text: The smoothies and bowls are delicious! The service is not what it once was. The past two times I have come (within a week of each other), one particular employee has been off-putting, which is a great way to lose business.

I had the pleasure of visiting them for the first time last week me and my husband it was truly nothing but amazing. I have been looking for someplace like this and I definitely do not regret going and I am a fan. Will continue to go amazing and the service and the atmosphere was awesome.
I wish I had a picture! Just know they have the best acai bowls I've ever had. The different base flavors along with their super yummy granola is top tier. Highly recommend!
Love the options and the flavors.
Everything was delicious and service super friendly. Great variety to choose from
Very tasty and fresh acai bowls!
Great service and delicious fresh bowls

Drove 20 mins from our house in Charlotte just to come here and we were not disappointed. My husband got the Sami bowl and I did a build your own and OMG, they were both sooo good. The place is also very aesthetically pleasing and enjoyed the atmosphere while sitting in enjoying our bowls. The person taking our order was also very knowledgeable and helped me figure out what base I wanted for my bowl with ease. We also got the green sip smoothie, and while on the very tangy side was still pretty good!! Will be back!

Fast and friendly service!
Had the protein bowl and it was delicious!
This has become one of my favorite places.

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text: By far the best Açaí bowl I’ve ever had and I am a well traveled plant based foodie! Definitely a must-go-to spot!

By far my favorite açaí bowl place! I’ve tried other acai bowl places and they weren’t this good. The prices are fair compared to other places and they provide a good fruit to acai ratio. The ladies behind the counter are extremely friendly and quick. This will be my go to spot!
Ryah was so helpful and nice, the food was very good.

Our entire soccer team (more than 30 people) descended all at once, unannounced on Palm Berries today and the staff knocked it outta the park with quick deliveries, bonus smiles, and srsly delicious bowls. Top notch!
Another Acai place closed, and I had to find another. I am so glad I found this one. I got a snack build your own. I enjoy they have many options to dress my bowl up.
I feel guilty for not trying this place sooner. Can’t wait to come back! The vibe, the service, and the food - 10/10!
The best smoothie in town
Really delicious açaí bowls with lots of variety.  The place was decorated nicely and staff were friendly.  Love having healthy options around!
Yasmene and katie were both so sweet from the door, There are so many options i became indecisive. and they answered any questions that I have as well as gave me great recommendations.
kailey had amazing service

Ryah was so patient and sweet- I had to give her a shout out! She answered my questions about the different proteins and rewards perfectly and did great business with not just me but all the customers. She was quick on the register which was helpful since I was on the go. She really made my experience and the green sip was delicious. Thanks Ryah!
Ryah got me and my boy mike right fr
Ryah was the BEST cashier and made the best food and is better than everyone else

Probably the best açaí place in Charlotte by far. Great quality açaí, fruit, and toppings. Customer service is usually friendly, and they are quick to get our order out despite having multiple bowls! Can’t wait to go again.
This place is awesome! A chill hangout spot and great service. You can even build your own bowl!
Fresh ingredients, great tasting smoothies & great atmosphere. Highly recommend. The horizon smoothie is so good! I love that they have dairy free smoothies.
Loved the açai bowls . Bowls are made with all fresh ingredients . Must try for healthy brunch or breakfast

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Alexis, we are so sorry for the less than satisfactory customer service you received. I would love the opportunity to make this right ASAP.

Please reach out to me via text or phone call at 980-866-2421

Or email at adil@palmberriesnc.com
reviews_data.review_text: Very good açaí bowls but service sucks. Employees aren’t friendly or welcoming. Today I came in and the girl who took my order was texting on her phone the entire time while taking my order. So rude.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting us and supporting a local, family owned business! We hope to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: My favorite place to go for açaí. The people who work there are all super nice and there are a lot of great flavors to choose from. Highly recommend to anyone who likes açaí.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hello, we are so sorry for the less than satisfactory customer service you received. I would love the opportunity to make this right ASAP.

Please reach out to me via text or phone call at 980-866-2421

Or email at adil@palmberriesnc.com
reviews_data.review_text: I ABSOLUTELY LOVED this place…until today, Monday, 3.11.25 @ 9:10am! I went in to order. A customer was nicely eating his food so knew someone was there. No one was in the front but I could see through the service window an employee cutting up pineapples. He looked at me twice over a course of 10 minutes. I still waited patiently for someone to come to the front…THEN dude stopped cutting the pineapple looked at me, started to walk towards me THEN stops looks back and walks back to cutting the pineapple! That was so RUDE and DISRESPECTFUL!! H w didn’t acknowledge me or anything! I just turned around and walked out! Sorry but that made me feel completely disrespected as a consumer and as a person! NEVER AGAIN THANKS TO THAT DUDE!!!
Fast service and food was good and fresh
Really cute spot, friendly people, great options, good quality bowls and smoothies.
This place is so cute. I got the Queen City bowl. It was delicious especially with the granola. The decor inside was amazing. The service was fantastic.
I come at least 3 to 4x a week and I love the bowls and the prices. Each purchase comes with a 15% off coupon!
Best açaí bowl I’ve ever had. Fresh and perfect blend of flavors. Employees were super helpful. New favorite spot!

Delicious bowls and smoothies. Great customer service plus place is very cute .
Highly recommend this place!!
the owner is an absolute jewel
Excellent açaí bowls, great customer service
Amazing customer service genuinely. The guy who runs the business is an amazing guy.

This is the best acai bowl I have EVER had.
I’ve been obsessed with acai for years and have lived in multiple states, no other one even comes close to this one. Palm Berries in Concord, NC is my new favorite place. Their acai, fruit, and other toppings are all very fresh and tasty. The place is clean, beautiful, and inviting. The staff at the front was also very helpful and knowledgeable with their menu being so big.
5 stars all around for sure ⭐️
The bowls are amazing but service is very dry not very welcoming at all I always greet them and say goodbye come here often review would be better if service was
This place is absolutely amazing. Not just the 1st time, but consistently, regardless of what employee is making it. Employees are very friendly and fast at what they do.

reviews_data.review_text:
Loved it so much we came back the next day for more!
Clean, fresh, and delicious! I love that we can have a healthy dessert that’s only 10 mins away from Trader Joe’s.
Such a cute place to sit and enjoy the açaí bowls. Loved the flavors and vibes.

Palm Berries is a gem in Concord! I recently visited this location with a group of friends. If you’re looking for a quick snack, or just a place to enjoy some healthy options, I highly recommend checking them out. I’ll definitely be coming back for more!
yummy food for good price!! kind workers as well. definitely recommend
Best acai bowl I've ever had
This is the best place in town for tasty healthy sweets with top notch management. This is a regular spot for me.
Best acai bowls in NC! I got the pink base bowl with strawberries, mango, and Nutella. The owner was so nice and welcoming!
best açaí bowls!!!! the owner was very kind and welcoming. would definitely come again 🤍
Best acai place I’ve ever been to! Came all the way from Oklahoma and I was beyond impressed by the bowls and service. Adil was very hospitable and incredibly nice. 100/10!
I love Açaí and i was looking for a good spot and Palm Berries is the perfect place! Inside is beautiful and Nitasha was super sweet and helpful! Definitely will be coming back!
Delightfully delicious! I got the Superhuman blend, with acai, spinach and protein. It was somehow even better than ice cream!
Great acai bowls! Great customer service and cute decor! I highly recommend!
I love the açaí bowls here! Highly recommend!!
The bowls are absolutely delicious with fresh toppings! Service was excellent—friendly, efficient and welcoming!
It’s such a artsy place very comforting , I love the staff, the bowls are soooo good!!

I ABSOLUTELY LOVE THIS PLACE. The ambience and vibes are so positive here. It’s so cute, it quite literally feels like I’m walking into a beach shop. The bowls are to DIE FOR. I’m normally one to go all the way to Charlotte to go to Spoons for an açaí bowl, but this place knocks everything out the park!

I moved here about a year and a half ago and have been searching for my “go to” açaí spot and have failed until NOW!! The vibe is beautiful and clean, the bowl was so delicious and fresh!!! 10/10 would recommend

Beautiful place to grab a delicious lunch!  The service was great and the staff was very helpful in answering all my questions about the menu.  I love the atmosphere but it is the food that will keep me coming back.  All the choices are so healthy and the fruit I had was very fresh.  I highly recommend Palm Berries, if you want a tasty, healthy, quick meal.
If you’re looking for healthy options that taste delicious, this is the spot!!!! I highly recommend!!!
Love love love this place! The palm bowl is my absolute favorite and the service is always on point!

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness

reviews_data.review_text: I had a great experience, employees are wonderful and the fast paced environment gave me plenty of time to take in the wonderful youthful vibes.
Definitely one of the nicest palm berries I’ve been too. The vibe was great, the workers were so helpful and kind. The price was affordable considering I didn’t spend much but a got a big portion.
The staff here are so friendly! Can’t wait to go back to try more.
Fantastic açaí bowls, quick service and really cozy environment. Will be going back

I can't say enough about how much I love this new açaí bowl spot! The bowls are packed with fresh fruits & perfectly blended açaí that hits the ideal balance of creamy and refreshing. Every bite is full of flavor, & the toppings are just the right touch. The staff is warm & friendly, creating a welcoming atmosphere that makes you want to come back again & again! ;)

Big thanks to Nitasha for making my bowl! She was so kind and thoughtful, and her expertise with palm berries really made the experience even better. The bowl was fresh, flavorful, and absolutely perfect. She truly knows what she’s doing!
One of the best place in Concord to have the most delicious healthy desserts. The uniqueness, taste, display, service is amazing .
So happy Palm Berries is in Concord! The best acai bowl you’ll ever have.💜
The food was so yummy and the customer service was awesome we were waited by Mr. AK ☺️
If vibes were edible, it’d be Palm Berries.
Delicious and great ambience!!

This place is AMAZING! The açaí bowls were so fresh and flavorful!
have to try this place, Definitely coming back soon!
Love this place so so much!! The atmosphere is perfect for any day and the acai bowls are so delicious and amazing!!
Absolutely loved my Dragon Bowl! Very delicious,  well made and Service was exceptional!

Great bowls, great staff, great atmosphere.

Highly recommend
These açaí bowls are fabulous. This location is so generous with the toppings. And there are loads of possible variations! Can’t wait to try them all!! 🤤
staff was very and helpful!

Palm Berries is the ultimate destination for a refreshing and delicious treat! Their acai bowls are packed with vibrant flavors, fresh toppings, and the perfect balance of sweetness and energy. Whether you're fueling up after a workout or just craving something nutritious, Palm Berries always delivers a bowl of pure bliss!
Best Açai bowl I have ever had! The atmosphere and the workers are so welcoming and the bowl I got was amazing and so beautiful 🥲 My new go-to.
looked and tasted delicious!
Loved the variety of fruits and toppings to choose from. Has such a lovely ambience.

I got the snack size bowl, Wow! It was delicious! Every bite had all the ingredients and the more I ate the better it was. The layers were excellent and perfect ripening of the fruit. The service was superb and I really enjoyed my experience. I will definitely be checking back in it was great!
Great service and caring employees. Their menu is huge and there’s something for everyone.
Really good spot for acai

The first time I came here, service was super fast. They didn’t disappoint the second time I came either. The atmosphere is relaxing and the customer service is amazing. There are plenty of amazing quality bowl combinations. 5 stars!
Best ever in the whole world. Açaí is great, it’s beautiful and clean inside, staff is all so nice and attentive.

Me and my boyfriend went here, it was so cute and it was genuinely the best açaí bowl i’ve ever had. When i couldn’t pick what flavor I wanted the dude working there let me sample them, the pink was the best! Definitely worth it!
Açaí bowls are undoubtedly 10/10 here, I got the protein bowl which I highly recommend. Workers were very welcoming and such a lovely atmosphere!! Will definitely be back to try more.
Great acai bowls in a cozy, trendy spot. Fresh ingredients and a relaxed vibe—perfect for a quick, healthy treat!
Wow! The best Açaí Bowl place in the state. I love this place, the owner provided such a welcoming feeling. Please visit at your soonest convenience for finest açaí bowl experience in your lifetime.
Excellent customer service. Delicious fruit bowls. Beautiful and cozy atmosphere. Thank you Palm Berries for making my night. Will surely be back for more.
Great service, always fresh!
This place is so freaking cute and the owner is incredibly nice!! The Acai tastes amazing as well and the fruits are so fresh.
Beautiful Aesthetic, nice fruit bowls. Must try

What a fantastic concept!! I LOVE the energy of this place!!  I’m trying to reduce my sugar intake so I ordered the Green Sip with Coconut milk. It was perfect!! I can’t wait to go back when I’m feeling a sweet tooth. I get tired of the coffee shops so this will be a perfect alternative for meetups or to bring my laptop for work. I’m so glad I popped in.
Seriously the best Acai in town, and I’ve been to every single local Acai shop because my fam and I are Acai lovers. I love the design, the seating, and all the different Acai options!
Tastes amazing & Great vibes! You don’t want to miss out!
So glad this place opened up!!! Açaí bowls and smoothies are both AMAZING. The inside has amazing art. 10/10
Perfect dessert experience.  The owner is very friendly and clearly does everything possible to insure that you have an enjoyable time.  By the way their fruit bowls are exemplary!
Great customer service,  and great smoothies too, just great atmosphere overall 10/10
Great customer service and the smoothies are my favorite and the atmosphere has a very peaceful vibe great job to the owners
The atmosphere here is very laid back and enjoyable. The smoothies are delicious and fulfilling. If you’re in the area definitely check them out.
Gorgeous up to date place with great acai bowls atmosphere & music ! Definitely will be back ! 10/10
Me and my gf tried this place for the first time, the customer service was great and the bowls were worth the price and the place was clean and neat
Much needed in Concord. Great açaí bowl that felt fresh! Great service and the owners were incredibly friendly.
Our first time trying! Will not be our last! It is very tasty, healthy, and fresh.
Workers are super friendly, seating area is super cool, and the protein bowl is excellent. Will come again!
Wonderful experience ! The staff was amazing and recommended the perfect bowl. Definitely will be coming here frequently !!
Absolutely amazing. The protein bowl is fantastic. The vibe is perfect for studying or hanging with friends. The interior is beautifully decorated. I absolutely recommend.
The acai bowl I got was so good! Such a great atmosphere with welcoming workers.

Best açaí bowls ever. I’ve been to several places, but this place beats the other ones. Not only the service is great, but they have so many options to pick from. I believe it was the owner and he came up to us and asked us if everything was okay and if we liked it of course we sure did. I would definitely going here again. Prices are not bad either and they have built your own. BTW this place is so clean. We order Queen City and Protein Bowl.
Wonderful staff, very kind and helpful, fast service, friendly owner! The lobby is set up very nicely, and definitely has a great vibe to it!
Amazing ambience and excellent service! So excited that Palm Berries opened up so close to home - I can’t wait to bring my friends with me next time! 🤩
Yummy
The best açaí bowl in NC!!  Great quality fruits & toppings!!
The best Açaí place in the Charlotte area!
The most amazing Açaí place I’ve ever been! The arrangement of the fruits is so pretty and the bowl itself is so refreshing to eat. I had such a hard time choosing from all the delicious options 🥲
so gooooood
The best place in town for acai bowls! Fruit is fresh and tastes great!
The best Acai bowl in Charlotte!! And the store interior is beautiful!!

reviews_data.review_text: The bowls are delicious. My new favorite spot!
Muy bien
I love ordering from here! The employees are very nice and helpful and the food is always delicious and prompt. Definitely one of my favorite places to go for a healthy meal nearby!!
This was our first time here. Super cute decor, yummy açaí bowl. My 12 year old and I shared a Sunset bowl in the “regular” size and couldn’t even finish it.
Great space to study! Great service and really good Açai.
This is a great place to hang with your daughter who loves the menu and always there.
Amazing place with friendly workers !!!! Delicious açaí bowls !!!!

reviews_data.review_text: They are very good and great service!

I decided to do this review after my third visit here… all 3 times a different associate, all 3 times no greeting, all 3 times no “ thank you “ or “have a nice day “. The bowls and beverages are great. I stop in when I’m in the area getting groceries from food lion next door. Just unfortunate my experience has been disappointing.
Always a great atmosphere. Loved the way she answered questions we had about featured bowls and it was quickly fixed.
My 2nd time & rapidly becoming my favorite
Great selection of acai bowls & smoothies!

My new favorite go-to spot just unlocked!! By far, this is my favorite Palm Berries location; employees even have my order memorized! Great customer service and they’re very quick and fast. I usually order and have my order the next minute. I highly recommend. These açaí bowls are to die for (warning: very addicting). Try the pure base!!! 🤤
The Food,service and atmosphere is amazing.The bowls are always delicious and they always give me extra nutella. The current employees are amazing !! Love this place!!

It is beautiful and gives a very calm relaxing feeling. The bowls are always very full with the freshest fruit. My favorite is the pineapple smoothie and both employees who made it made it perfect. They are always very kind and helpful with suggestions. 10 out of 10

reviews_data.owner_answer:
We are so sorry for this regretful experience. Please let me make up for it and show you what Palm Berries Concord aims to be! 

Text me @ 980-866-2421 or email me at adil@palmberriesnc.com please so we can make rectify this experience of yours!
reviews_data.review_text: Had gone to a grande opening of another location and didn't have the best experience, tried this location because it's closer to home hoping for better & absolutely not. Found two hairs in my bowl before taking a fullbite, the girl at the counter rolled her eyes when I handed it back to her & just said "sorry". Second bowl served was liquidy, not nearly as many toppings. The tables floors and seats were absolutely disgusting and didn't look as nice as the other store i had been to. Giving up on Palm Berries in general due to a second terrible experience even at another location
The bowls are always plentiful and delicious

We’re always up for an açaí bowl and happened upon Palm Berries in Concord.  This place definitely gets a lot of traffic but things move pretty quickly so there was not much waiting.  They have a different twist on some of the açaí bases where they incorporate other items into them such as bananas, spinach and protein.  Not saying this was good or bad but different; it does dilute the açaí though.  I enjoyed a medium Protein Bowl and it was good.  They have two other sizes; a snack size and then Jumbo.  A medium was ample for someone with an average appetite.  The staff provided great service.  I did think the prices were a little high.  Overall though, a good experience and we will visit again.
Suad is a great worker who really brightened my day with her kindness!
the bowls are amazing!!! the employees were also super nice!! wonderful place

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Holly, 

We are so sorry for this unacceptable experience. We would love for an opportunity to show you how much we appreciate not only your feedback, but you as a customer as well.

Please reach out to us at 980-866-2421 or adil@palmberriesnc.com and let us make it right
reviews_data.review_text: There was not a lot of Açai base in my bowl. There was, however, a lot of hair in it.

reviews_data.review_text: A lot of the times it’s great. But today, the girl who fixed my order act like she was irritated because they messed up my orders that I paid extra for it to make it a certain way, so most of the time it’s great but today the vibes were definitely off! Posted
Live everything about Palm Berries!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Been a fan of Palm Berries for several years since the food truck days! Consistent, delicious and something I always look forward to! Thanks!!
Loved loved loved. Place had great vibes and energy. Very cute and chilled. Loved how fast services was would for SURE !!!!! Hands down Will return.

Oh my stars! The Dubai Chocolate Açaí Bowl was absolutely heavenly. Hands down the best açaí bowl I have ever had! Not only was the flavor combination amazing, the amount of toppings they put on are the perfect amount to go with every single bite. Sometimes açai bowls run out of the toppings before you’re done with the entire bowl, but not this one. The ambience here is also so cute. Another thing I run into with açai bowls is they take a while to be made; this place made the bowl so quickly.

Great customer service and presentations from June and Betsy
We will be coming back for their fruits bowls!
Delicious Acai bowls! Definitely recommend!

bro their açaí bowls are fire, literally everything is so clean, they’re so respectful and they take good care of their customers which means alottt!  shout out to the hijabi queens that are so respectful and caring, can’t remember their names but they’re so sweet!

The Best Bowl Place in Concord without Question. Highly recommend from QtheBoxer
Don’t go bad place go to the other and you will see the different
Great service! Great food 100% recommend

reviews_data.review_text: The cutest place ever with the best staff! I have had the best experiences here they are so nice and make your bowl/blend in a timely manner! The smoothies and bowls are the best I’ve ever had!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Nader,
We take reviews seriously, but your comments are completely misleading and omit critical context.
On multiple occasions, your behavior in our establishment was unacceptable. You directed aggressive and inappropriate conduct toward our staff, including 16-year-old employees, which we will not tolerate under any circumstances. There was also an incident where you caused a disturbance—dropping items and yelling—creating an uncomfortable and hostile environment for both our team and other customers.
Despite this, we made repeated efforts to accommodate you and resolve your concerns each time you visited. Unfortunately, every interaction—whether with you or your wife—resulted in issues. After a clear pattern of disruptive behavior, we made the necessary decision to refuse service in order to protect our employees and maintain a respectful environment.
Your decision to now post false claims because you are no longer welcome is disappointing, but it does not change the facts of what occurred.
reviews_data.review_text:
2 time I purchase from them and the two time it was hair in my bowl is really nasty place when I went back I told them and show to them they act like they don’t care bad place to go to
Go to the one it’s 20 minute away way more clean and way better people working there
You can see a smile when you open the door at the other place
Amazing!!
Palm Berries never disappoints! Our favorite smoothie place!
We love going to Palm Berries! The bowls are always delicious and the staff is very friendly!
Every worker was friendly and I was greeted right away as I walked in. Great relaxing atmosphere. Smoothie was very delicious and worth the price. I highly recommend this place to others.

Go to the other location you will receive some respect no manger employees they do what ever they want my bowl was dirty açaí was all over from outside I went back and talk to the little girl there she was really rude not want to help
She said that’s how it come
Worst place dirty
Lucero was super sweet and accommodating I will def be back!

Every time I go it’s always clean it smells good and I always get the best service I went the other day and I was able to get my bowl put into a drink thanks to Betsy and the cashier was so sweet I can’t pronounce her name but it starts with an L!
These girls are wicked fast, foods always top quality
I love love love this place. The bowls are always hitting, the staff is so friendly and the environment is very calming. Music is a nice touch too 💯💯💞

Worst employee’s and management
Ever
Ryah was so amazing so kind, thoughtful, and really helped me through the process of ordering and she’s beautiful!!
Great place the blend (smoothie) I got was fantastic tasted really fresh and fruity 10/10👍🏼
Love this place!
I ordered the Palm bowl and it’s delicious. The service at this location is also great.
Love it.  So tasty
Vibes were berry good 😋
Palm Berries Is the most consistent with their “ açaí bowls “, I am so impressed by the quality and price point. I’ve ordered via DoorDash on multiple occasions.
Love Palm Berries! Their acai bowls are excellent and they have so many options.

My husband has been going here all the time and I was finally able to to join him. Wow. Was really missing out! Being to Hawaii several times we have become acai bowl snobs, by this place is the closest we’ve been! The fruit is really fresh and the acai amazing! Takes us right back to the beaches of Honolulu. Do your self a favor and check this place out! You won’t be disappointed. 😋
Great customer service and quality! The employees were very nice and helpful and the açaí bowls were very good!
So good! The açaí was delicious and it’s decorated so cute!
Great customer service, great food, love the ambiance and the aesthetics of the store front.
Not only were the bowls amazing but what really had me sold was the atmosphere. Nobody does it like they do, 100% the best açaí!!!
Whole staff is A1
Quiet. Peaceful. Great service. Good at explaining process and ingredients. Yummy.
My favorite spot for Açaí bowls & smoothies!!
Hands down the best Açai in Concord. Spotless hygiene, incredible taste everything here is top notch.  Dubai chocolate bowl is an absolute must try. 🍓

We ordered our bowls online to go and they were perfect - full to the brim and delicious. The person working also knows us and immediately pulls our order out of the fridge when we get there so there’s no waiting. Great service!

I love this place , I frequent this location and the one in Mooresville! I’m trying to be a little more health conscious and was craving a Dubai chocolate treat and this place has a bowl but I wanted to see if I can get it in smoothie form. The young lady was stoked to experiment and make it for me and it is freaking delicious!

I love Palm Berries Concord! I can’t quit the Dubai bowls to even try anything else! The staff is usually very kind and one sweet girl even knows when she sees me that I’m getting the Dubai bowl! Super fan!

My husband and I never realized the workers don’t wear hair nets preparing the food until I found a curly black piece of hair in mine tonight. I’ll be more weary of this place moving forward now that I’ve noticed this.

The food is usually good, but consistently gets orders wrong even when they were placed online with specific toppings listed on the ticket. Not to mention they charge extra for each topping. They forgot the granola on both bowls the last time I came, and the nutella/peanut butter has not been the best lately
Great service

The floor is decorated in a special paint. The AC is always right. The smell of fruits, ice cream, berries, and cozy atmosphere is welcoming. Can't sit more then 20 people. Music is welcoming and entertaining.
This is my 10 or 11 Dubai bowl I  have ordered. The  thing is sooo gooood.  From start to end.
I just can't find my points that I have accumulated. But one day it will show up.
Everything is so natural  and fulfilling.
Great environment
Really excited to try
I love your guys a aj
Absolutely amazing! Fresh ingredients. Nice atmosphere.

Palm Berries in Concord is my favorite spots for acai bowls! Their bowls are always fresh and delicious, and i love that they offer a “create your bowl” option so i can customize exactly what I’m craving.

My açaí order is pretty basic but i love it…
Base: Classic
Fruit: Strawberries & bananas
Dry toppings: chocolate chips
Drizzle: Peanut butter
All bowls come with granola unless otherwise specified.

the portions are generous, the ingredients taste super fresh, and everything is beautifully put together. on top of that, the staff is always so friendly and welcoming, which makes the experience even better. highly recommend if you’re looking for a healthy, refreshing treat!
I loooove this spot! Fruit is always fresh, order is always right, delicious!! A must try.
Best acai ever 🤑 they load it up too😌
Palm Berries is amazing Fresh and tasty food, delicious drinks and ice creams, friendly service, and a clean relaxing atmosphere. Highly recommend

I’ve been to palm berries twice now and both times it was amazing. I’ve tried a lot of acai  bowls at different places, but this is by far the best! It’s super fresh and beautifully made. The shop was aesthetically pleasing and has clean vibe to it. Most importantly everything tastes as good as it looks. This is a 10/10 must try!
Absolutely loved everything, service was top-notch.  Highly recommend!

Palm Berries in Charlotte is a fantastic spot! Their creations are incredibly fresh and delicious, and they have a great variety of options. It's the perfect healthy treat, and the staff is always so friendly. Highly recommend it!
Really loved the atmosphere

reviews_data.review_text: Great food.  Best prices. Excellent service. Amazing vibe. 100% recommended. Must try.

reviews_data.review_text: The smoothies and bowls are delicious! The service is not what it once was. The past two times I have come (within a week of each other), one particular employee has been off-putting, which is a great way to lose business.

I had the pleasure of visiting them for the first time last week me and my husband it was truly nothing but amazing. I have been looking for someplace like this and I definitely do not regret going and I am a fan. Will continue to go amazing and the service and the atmosphere was awesome.
I wish I had a picture! Just know they have the best acai bowls I've ever had. The different base flavors along with their super yummy granola is top tier. Highly recommend!
Love the options and the flavors.
Everything was delicious and service super friendly. Great variety to choose from
Very tasty and fresh acai bowls!
Great service and delicious fresh bowls

Drove 20 mins from our house in Charlotte just to come here and we were not disappointed. My husband got the Sami bowl and I did a build your own and OMG, they were both sooo good. The place is also very aesthetically pleasing and enjoyed the atmosphere while sitting in enjoying our bowls. The person taking our order was also very knowledgeable and helped me figure out what base I wanted for my bowl with ease. We also got the green sip smoothie, and while on the very tangy side was still pretty good!! Will be back!

Fast and friendly service!
Had the protein bowl and it was delicious!
This has become one of my favorite places.

reviews_data.review_text: By far the best Açaí bowl I’ve ever had and I am a well traveled plant based foodie! Definitely a must-go-to spot!

By far my favorite açaí bowl place! I’ve tried other acai bowl places and they weren’t this good. The prices are fair compared to other places and they provide a good fruit to acai ratio. The ladies behind the counter are extremely friendly and quick. This will be my go to spot!
Ryah was so helpful and nice, the food was very good.

Our entire soccer team (more than 30 people) descended all at once, unannounced on Palm Berries today and the staff knocked it outta the park with quick deliveries, bonus smiles, and srsly delicious bowls. Top notch!
Another Acai place closed, and I had to find another. I am so glad I found this one. I got a snack build your own. I enjoy they have many options to dress my bowl up.
I feel guilty for not trying this place sooner. Can’t wait to come back! The vibe, the service, and the food - 10/10!
The best smoothie in town
Really delicious açaí bowls with lots of variety.  The place was decorated nicely and staff were friendly.  Love having healthy options around!
Yasmene and katie were both so sweet from the door, There are so many options i became indecisive. and they answered any questions that I have as well as gave me great recommendations.
kailey had amazing service

Ryah was so patient and sweet- I had to give her a shout out! She answered my questions about the different proteins and rewards perfectly and did great business with not just me but all the customers. She was quick on the register which was helpful since I was on the go. She really made my experience and the green sip was delicious. Thanks Ryah!
Ryah got me and my boy mike right fr
Ryah was the BEST cashier and made the best food and is better than everyone else

Probably the best açaí place in Charlotte by far. Great quality açaí, fruit, and toppings. Customer service is usually friendly, and they are quick to get our order out despite having multiple bowls! Can’t wait to go again.
This place is awesome! A chill hangout spot and great service. You can even build your own bowl!
Fresh ingredients, great tasting smoothies & great atmosphere. Highly recommend. The horizon smoothie is so good! I love that they have dairy free smoothies.
Loved the açai bowls . Bowls are made with all fresh ingredients . Must try for healthy brunch or breakfast

reviews_data.review_text: Very good açaí bowls but service sucks. Employees aren’t friendly or welcoming. Today I came in and the girl who took my order was texting on her phone the entire time while taking my order. So rude.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting us and supporting a local, family owned business! We hope to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: My favorite place to go for açaí. The people who work there are all super nice and there are a lot of great flavors to choose from. Highly recommend to anyone who likes açaí.

reviews_data.review_text: I ABSOLUTELY LOVED this place…until today, Monday, 3.11.25 @ 9:10am! I went in to order. A customer was nicely eating his food so knew someone was there. No one was in the front but I could see through the service window an employee cutting up pineapples. He looked at me twice over a course of 10 minutes. I still waited patiently for someone to come to the front…THEN dude stopped cutting the pineapple looked at me, started to walk towards me THEN stops looks back and walks back to cutting the pineapple! That was so RUDE and DISRESPECTFUL!! H w didn’t acknowledge me or anything! I just turned around and walked out! Sorry but that made me feel completely disrespected as a consumer and as a person! NEVER AGAIN THANKS TO THAT DUDE!!!
Fast service and food was good and fresh
Really cute spot, friendly people, great options, good quality bowls and smoothies.
This place is so cute. I got the Queen City bowl. It was delicious especially with the granola. The decor inside was amazing. The service was fantastic.
I come at least 3 to 4x a week and I love the bowls and the prices. Each purchase comes with a 15% off coupon!
Best açaí bowl I’ve ever had. Fresh and perfect blend of flavors. Employees were super helpful. New favorite spot!

Delicious bowls and smoothies. Great customer service plus place is very cute .
Highly recommend this place!!
the owner is an absolute jewel
Excellent açaí bowls, great customer service
Amazing customer service genuinely. The guy who runs the business is an amazing guy.

This is the best acai bowl I have EVER had.
I’ve been obsessed with acai for years and have lived in multiple states, no other one even comes close to this one. Palm Berries in Concord, NC is my new favorite place. Their acai, fruit, and other toppings are all very fresh and tasty. The place is clean, beautiful, and inviting. The staff at the front was also very helpful and knowledgeable with their menu being so big.
5 stars all around for sure ⭐️
The bowls are amazing but service is very dry not very welcoming at all I always greet them and say goodbye come here often review would be better if service was
This place is absolutely amazing. Not just the 1st time, but consistently, regardless of what employee is making it. Employees are very friendly and fast at what they do.

reviews_data.review_text:
Loved it so much we came back the next day for more!
Clean, fresh, and delicious! I love that we can have a healthy dessert that’s only 10 mins away from Trader Joe’s.
Such a cute place to sit and enjoy the açaí bowls. Loved the flavors and vibes.

Palm Berries is a gem in Concord! I recently visited this location with a group of friends. If you’re looking for a quick snack, or just a place to enjoy some healthy options, I highly recommend checking them out. I’ll definitely be coming back for more!
yummy food for good price!! kind workers as well. definitely recommend
Best acai bowl I've ever had
This is the best place in town for tasty healthy sweets with top notch management. This is a regular spot for me.
Best acai bowls in NC! I got the pink base bowl with strawberries, mango, and Nutella. The owner was so nice and welcoming!
best açaí bowls!!!! the owner was very kind and welcoming. would definitely come again 🤍
Best acai place I’ve ever been to! Came all the way from Oklahoma and I was beyond impressed by the bowls and service. Adil was very hospitable and incredibly nice. 100/10!
I love Açaí and i was looking for a good spot and Palm Berries is the perfect place! Inside is beautiful and Nitasha was super sweet and helpful! Definitely will be coming back!
Delightfully delicious! I got the Superhuman blend, with acai, spinach and protein. It was somehow even better than ice cream!
Great acai bowls! Great customer service and cute decor! I highly recommend!
I love the açaí bowls here! Highly recommend!!
The bowls are absolutely delicious with fresh toppings! Service was excellent—friendly, efficient and welcoming!
It’s such a artsy place very comforting , I love the staff, the bowls are soooo good!!

I ABSOLUTELY LOVE THIS PLACE. The ambience and vibes are so positive here. It’s so cute, it quite literally feels like I’m walking into a beach shop. The bowls are to DIE FOR. I’m normally one to go all the way to Charlotte to go to Spoons for an açaí bowl, but this place knocks everything out the park!

I moved here about a year and a half ago and have been searching for my “go to” açaí spot and have failed until NOW!! The vibe is beautiful and clean, the bowl was so delicious and fresh!!! 10/10 would recommend

Beautiful place to grab a delicious lunch!  The service was great and the staff was very helpful in answering all my questions about the menu.  I love the atmosphere but it is the food that will keep me coming back.  All the choices are so healthy and the fruit I had was very fresh.  I highly recommend Palm Berries, if you want a tasty, healthy, quick meal.
If you’re looking for healthy options that taste delicious, this is the spot!!!! I highly recommend!!!
Love love love this place! The palm bowl is my absolute favorite and the service is always on point!

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness

reviews_data.review_text: I had a great experience, employees are wonderful and the fast paced environment gave me plenty of time to take in the wonderful youthful vibes.
Definitely one of the nicest palm berries I’ve been too. The vibe was great, the workers were so helpful and kind. The price was affordable considering I didn’t spend much but a got a big portion.
The staff here are so friendly! Can’t wait to go back to try more.
Fantastic açaí bowls, quick service and really cozy environment. Will be going back

I can't say enough about how much I love this new açaí bowl spot! The bowls are packed with fresh fruits & perfectly blended açaí that hits the ideal balance of creamy and refreshing. Every bite is full of flavor, & the toppings are just the right touch. The staff is warm & friendly, creating a welcoming atmosphere that makes you want to come back again & again! ;)

Big thanks to Nitasha for making my bowl! She was so kind and thoughtful, and her expertise with palm berries really made the experience even better. The bowl was fresh, flavorful, and absolutely perfect. She truly knows what she’s doing!
One of the best place in Concord to have the most delicious healthy desserts. The uniqueness, taste, display, service is amazing .
So happy Palm Berries is in Concord! The best acai bowl you’ll ever have.💜
The food was so yummy and the customer service was awesome we were waited by Mr. AK ☺️
If vibes were edible, it’d be Palm Berries.
Delicious and great ambience!!

This place is AMAZING! The açaí bowls were so fresh and flavorful!
have to try this place, Definitely coming back soon!
Love this place so so much!! The atmosphere is perfect for any day and the acai bowls are so delicious and amazing!!
Absolutely loved my Dragon Bowl! Very delicious,  well made and Service was exceptional!

Great bowls, great staff, great atmosphere.

Highly recommend
These açaí bowls are fabulous. This location is so generous with the toppings. And there are loads of possible variations! Can’t wait to try them all!! 🤤
staff was very and helpful!

Palm Berries is the ultimate destination for a refreshing and delicious treat! Their acai bowls are packed with vibrant flavors, fresh toppings, and the perfect balance of sweetness and energy. Whether you're fueling up after a workout or just craving something nutritious, Palm Berries always delivers a bowl of pure bliss!
Best Açai bowl I have ever had! The atmosphere and the workers are so welcoming and the bowl I got was amazing and so beautiful 🥲 My new go-to.
looked and tasted delicious!
Loved the variety of fruits and toppings to choose from. Has such a lovely ambience.

I got the snack size bowl, Wow! It was delicious! Every bite had all the ingredients and the more I ate the better it was. The layers were excellent and perfect ripening of the fruit. The service was superb and I really enjoyed my experience. I will definitely be checking back in it was great!
Great service and caring employees. Their menu is huge and there’s something for everyone.
Really good spot for acai

The first time I came here, service was super fast. They didn’t disappoint the second time I came either. The atmosphere is relaxing and the customer service is amazing. There are plenty of amazing quality bowl combinations. 5 stars!
Best ever in the whole world. Açaí is great, it’s beautiful and clean inside, staff is all so nice and attentive.

Me and my boyfriend went here, it was so cute and it was genuinely the best açaí bowl i’ve ever had. When i couldn’t pick what flavor I wanted the dude working there let me sample them, the pink was the best! Definitely worth it!
Açaí bowls are undoubtedly 10/10 here, I got the protein bowl which I highly recommend. Workers were very welcoming and such a lovely atmosphere!! Will definitely be back to try more.
Great acai bowls in a cozy, trendy spot. Fresh ingredients and a relaxed vibe—perfect for a quick, healthy treat!
Wow! The best Açaí Bowl place in the state. I love this place, the owner provided such a welcoming feeling. Please visit at your soonest convenience for finest açaí bowl experience in your lifetime.
Excellent customer service. Delicious fruit bowls. Beautiful and cozy atmosphere. Thank you Palm Berries for making my night. Will surely be back for more.
Great service, always fresh!
This place is so freaking cute and the owner is incredibly nice!! The Acai tastes amazing as well and the fruits are so fresh.
Beautiful Aesthetic, nice fruit bowls. Must try

What a fantastic concept!! I LOVE the energy of this place!!  I’m trying to reduce my sugar intake so I ordered the Green Sip with Coconut milk. It was perfect!! I can’t wait to go back when I’m feeling a sweet tooth. I get tired of the coffee shops so this will be a perfect alternative for meetups or to bring my laptop for work. I’m so glad I popped in.
Seriously the best Acai in town, and I’ve been to every single local Acai shop because my fam and I are Acai lovers. I love the design, the seating, and all the different Acai options!
Tastes amazing & Great vibes! You don’t want to miss out!
So glad this place opened up!!! Açaí bowls and smoothies are both AMAZING. The inside has amazing art. 10/10
Perfect dessert experience.  The owner is very friendly and clearly does everything possible to insure that you have an enjoyable time.  By the way their fruit bowls are exemplary!
Great customer service,  and great smoothies too, just great atmosphere overall 10/10
Great customer service and the smoothies are my favorite and the atmosphere has a very peaceful vibe great job to the owners
The atmosphere here is very laid back and enjoyable. The smoothies are delicious and fulfilling. If you’re in the area definitely check them out.
Gorgeous up to date place with great acai bowls atmosphere & music ! Definitely will be back ! 10/10
Me and my gf tried this place for the first time, the customer service was great and the bowls were worth the price and the place was clean and neat
Much needed in Concord. Great açaí bowl that felt fresh! Great service and the owners were incredibly friendly.
Our first time trying! Will not be our last! It is very tasty, healthy, and fresh.
Workers are super friendly, seating area is super cool, and the protein bowl is excellent. Will come again!
Wonderful experience ! The staff was amazing and recommended the perfect bowl. Definitely will be coming here frequently !!
Absolutely amazing. The protein bowl is fantastic. The vibe is perfect for studying or hanging with friends. The interior is beautifully decorated. I absolutely recommend.
The acai bowl I got was so good! Such a great atmosphere with welcoming workers.

Best açaí bowls ever. I’ve been to several places, but this place beats the other ones. Not only the service is great, but they have so many options to pick from. I believe it was the owner and he came up to us and asked us if everything was okay and if we liked it of course we sure did. I would definitely going here again. Prices are not bad either and they have built your own. BTW this place is so clean. We order Queen City and Protein Bowl.
Wonderful staff, very kind and helpful, fast service, friendly owner! The lobby is set up very nicely, and definitely has a great vibe to it!
Amazing ambience and excellent service! So excited that Palm Berries opened up so close to home - I can’t wait to bring my friends with me next time! 🤩
Yummy
The best açaí bowl in NC!!  Great quality fruits & toppings!!
The best Açaí place in the Charlotte area!
The most amazing Açaí place I’ve ever been! The arrangement of the fruits is so pretty and the bowl itself is so refreshing to eat. I had such a hard time choosing from all the delicious options 🥲
so gooooood
The best place in town for acai bowls! Fruit is fresh and tastes great!
The best Acai bowl in Charlotte!! And the store interior is beautiful!!
